parsed.recommendation_text: For commuting, the JBL Tune 770NC offers a solid balance of features and value. With basic noise cancellation, it still provides decent isolation for your commute at an affordable price point. The battery life is commendable at 44 hours, ensuring you won't need to recharge frequently during daily use. While the build quality is plastic-heavy, this keeps the weight down to a comfortable 225 grams. Despite lacking high-res codec support and detailed sound at higher volumes, it remains an excellent choice for budget-conscious commuters.
parsed.selection_rationale: Best value with decent noise cancellation and long battery life.
